drift_detection_id_for_checking_status: Drift detection ID for checking status
id_from_detect_stack_drift_output: ID from Detect Stack Drift output
integrate_aws_cloudformation_into_workfl: Integrate AWS CloudFormation into workflows. Describe stacks, list resources, detect drift, view stack events, retrieve templates, and validate templates. Requires AWS access key and secret access key.
list_cloudformation_stacks_with_their_st: List CloudFormation stacks with their status, region, and resources to build a single inventory of deployed infrastructure.
list_of_cloudformation_stacks_with_statu: List of CloudFormation stacks with status, outputs, and tags
list_of_stack_resources_with_type_status: List of stack resources with type, status, and drift info
manage_and_inspect_aws_cloudformation_st: Manage and inspect AWS CloudFormation stacks, resources, and drift
pull_recent_cloudformation_stack_events_: Pull recent CloudFormation stack events to diagnose a failed create, update, or rollback and explain the root cause.
run_drift_detection_on_cloudformation_st: Run drift detection on CloudFormation stacks and summarize resources whose live config no longer matches the template.
stack_events_with_resource_status_and_ti: Stack events with resource status and timestamps
transforms_used_in_the_template_e_g_aws: Transforms used in the template (e.g., AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31)
